DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy C. Cronin, Esq., 415-951-0166, appeared on behalf of Yolanda Papes individually and as executor of the estate of Eugenia Grand Pinchotto. Lisa J. Crawford, Esq., 415-433-1060, appeared on behalf of plaintiff.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling: sustained with 10 days leave to amend to allege facts in support of Plaintiff's contention that monetary damages are inadequate to compensate for services rendered and that a cause of action for quasi special performance is appropriate. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
